advanced-filter-description: Ajọ to ti ni ilọsiwaju ngbanilaaye lati kọ okun kan ti o ni awọn oniṣẹ atẹle: == != <= >= && || () A lo aaye kan bi oluyapa laarin Awọn oniṣẹ. O le ṣe àlẹmọ fun gbogbo Awọn aaye Aṣa nipa titẹ awọn orukọ ati iye wọn. Fun apẹẹrẹ: Field1 == Iye1. Akiyesi: Ti awọn aaye tabi awọn iye ba ni awọn aaye ninu, o nilo lati fi wọn kun sinu awọn agbasọ ẹyọkan. Fun apẹẹrẹ: 'Field 1' == 'Iye 1'. Fun awọn ami iṣakoso ẹyọkan (' \/) lati fo, o le lo \. Fun apẹẹrẹ: Field1 == Emi. Bakannaa o le darapọ awọn ipo pupọ. Fun apẹẹrẹ: F1 == V1 || F1 == V2. Ni deede gbogbo awọn oniṣẹ ni a tumọ lati osi si otun. O le yi aṣẹ pada nipa gbigbe awọn biraketi. Fun apẹẹrẹ: F1 == V1 && ( F2 == V2 || F2 == V3 ). Bakannaa o le wa awọn aaye ọrọ nipa lilo regex: F1 == /Tes.*/i

globalSearch-instructions-description: Awọn wiwa le pẹlu awọn oniṣẹ lati tunse wiwa naa.  Awọn oniṣẹ ti wa ni pato nipa kikọ orukọ oniṣẹ ati iye ti o yapa nipasẹ oluṣafihan.  Fun apẹẹrẹ, sipesifikesonu oniṣẹ ti `list:Blocked` yoo fi opin si wiwa si awọn kaadi ti o wa ninu atokọ ti a npè ni *Ti dina*.  Ti iye naa ba ni awọn alafo tabi awọn ohun kikọ pataki o gbọdọ wa ni paamọ ni awọn ami asọye (fun apẹẹrẹ `__operator_list__:"To Review"`).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-board: `__operator_board__:<title>` - ​​awọn kaadi ti o wa ninu awọn igbimọ ti o baamu pato *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-list: `__operator_list__:<title>` - ​​awọn kaadi ninu awọn akojọ ti o baamu pato *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-swiml: `__operator_swimlane__:<title>` - ​​awọn kaadi ni awọn odo odo ti o baamu pato *<title>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-comme: `__operator_comment__:<text>` - ​​awọn kaadi pẹlu ọrọ asọye ti o ni *<text>*.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-label: `__operator_label__:<color>` `__operator_label__:<name>` - awọn kaadi ti o ni aami ibaamu *<color>* tabi *<name>
globalSearch-instructions-operator-user: `__operator_user__:<username>` - ​​awọn kaadi nibiti *<username>* jẹ * ọmọ ẹgbẹ * tabi * apinfunni *
globalSearch-instructions-operator-creat: `__operator_creator__:<username>` - ​​awọn kaadi nibiti *<username>* jẹ ẹlẹda kaadi naa
globalSearch-instructions-operator-org: `__operator_org__:<display name|short name>` - ​​awọn kaadi ti o jẹ ti igbimọ ti a yàn si agbari *<name>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-team: `__operator_team__:<display name|short name>` - ​​awọn kaadi ti o jẹ ti igbimọ ti a yàn si ẹgbẹ *<name>*
globalSearch-instructions-operator-due: `__operator_due__:<n>` - ​​awọn kaadi ti o wa titi di *<n>* awọn ọjọ lati isisiyi.  `__operator_due__:__predicate_overdue__ ṣe atokọ gbogbo awọn kaadi ti o ti kọja ọjọ ti o yẹ wọn.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-creat: `__operator_created__:<n>` - ​​awọn kaadi eyi ti a ṣẹda *<n>* ọjọ seyin tabi kere si
globalSearch-instructions-operator-modif: `__operator_modified__:<n>` - ​​awọn kaadi eyi ti a ti títúnṣe *<n>* ọjọ seyin tabi kere si
globalSearch-instructions-status-archive: @ PH0 @ @ - awọn kaadi ti o ti fipamọ
globalSearch-instructions-status-all: `__predicate_all__` - ​​gbogbo awọn kaadi ti o wa ni ipamọ ati ti a ko fi pamọ
globalSearch-instructions-status-public: @ PH0 @ @ - awọn kaadi nikan ni gbangba lọọgan
globalSearch-instructions-operator-has: `__operator_has__:<field>` - ​​nibiti *<field>* jẹ ọkan ninu `__predicate_attachment__`, `__predicate_checklist__`, `__predicate_description__`, `__predicate_start__`, `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_end__`, `__predicate_assignee__` tabi `__predicate_member__`.  Gbigbe `-` iwaju *<field>* awọn wiwa fun aini iye kan ni aaye yẹn (fun apẹẹrẹ `has:-due` awọn wiwa fun awọn kaadi laisi ọjọ ipari).
globalSearch-instructions-operator-sort: `__operator_sort__:<sort-name>` - ​​nibiti *<sort-name>* jẹ ọkan ninu `__predicate_due__`, `__predicate_created__` tabi `__predicate_modified__`.  Fun iru sokale, gbe `-` siwaju orukọ too naa.
globalSearch-instructions-operator-limit: `__operator_limit__:<n>` - ​​nibiti *<n>* jẹ odidi rere ti n ṣalaye nọmba awọn kaadi ti yoo han ni oju-iwe kan.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-1: Awọn oniṣẹ lọpọlọpọ le wa ni pato.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-2:
Awọn oniṣẹ ti o jọra jẹ * OR * ed papọ.  Awọn kaadi ti o baramu eyikeyi ninu awọn ipo ni yoo da pada.
`__operator_list__:Available __operator_list__:Blocked` yoo da awọn kaadi ti o wa ninu eyikeyi akojọ ti a npè ni *Ti dina mọ* tabi *Wa*.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3: Awọn oniṣẹ iyatọ jẹ * AND * ed papọ.  Awọn kaadi nikan ti o baamu gbogbo awọn oniṣẹ ti o yatọ ni a pada.  `__operator_list__:Available __operator_label__:red` awọn kaadi nikan pada wa ninu atokọ * Wa * pẹlu aami * pupa * kan.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-3-2: Awọn ọjọ le jẹ asọye bi odidi rere tabi odi odi tabi lilo `__predicate_week__`, `__predicate_month__`, `__predicate_quarter__` tabi `__predicate_year__` fun asiko lọwọlọwọ.
globalSearch-instructions-notes-5: Nipa aiyipada awọn kaadi pamosi ko wa.

database-migration-description: Ṣí data ti o da lori ọrọ (ohun gbogbo ayafi awọn asomọ ati awọn afata, eyiti o wa lori eto faili) laarin MongoDB ati FerretDB v1 (SQLite). Ibi ipamọ data miiran gbọdọ nṣiṣẹ ati de ọdọ (awọn ibudo aiyipada: FerretDB mongodb://127.0.0.1:27018, MongoDB mongodb://127.0.0.1:27019; abo pẹlu WEKAN_FERRETDB_URL / WEKAN_MONGODB_URL). Lẹhin ti o pari, tọka MONGO_URL si ibi ipamọ data miiran ki o tun WeKan bẹrẹ (lori Snap: snap set wekan database=ferretdb tabi =mongodb).
database-migrate-to-ferretdb: Ṣí data ọrọ si FerretDB v1 (SQLite)
database-migration-confirm: Daakọ gbogbo awọn akojọpọ ti o da lori ọrọ si __db__? A ko kan awọn asomọ ati awọn afata lori eto faili. Ibi ipamọ data ibi-afẹde gbọdọ nṣiṣẹ.
sandstorm-migration-description: Nigbati WeKan ba nṣiṣẹ inu ọkà Sandstorm, ibi ipamọ data MongoDB 3 atijọ rẹ ni a ṣí si FerretDB v1 (SQLite) ni ifilọlẹ akọkọ, ati awọn asomọ ati awọn afata ni a gbe lati ibi ipamọ data si awọn folda files/attachments ati files/avatars ọkà naa. Eyi fihan boya iṣilọ yẹn ṣaṣeyọri ati iye aaye disk ti awọn faili ibi ipamọ data MongoDB aise atijọ tun lo inu ọkà, ati pe o jẹ ki o paarẹ awọn faili aise wọnyẹn lati tu aaye silẹ.
sandstorm-raw-mongodb: Awọn faili ibi ipamọ data MongoDB 3 aise
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb: Paarẹ awọn faili ibi ipamọ data MongoDB aise
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb-description: Lẹhin iṣilọ aṣeyọri, data wa ninu FerretDB ati lori eto faili, nitorina awọn faili ibi ipamọ data MongoDB 3 aise atijọ ni a le paarẹ lati tu aaye disk ọkà silẹ. Eyi ko le yi pada.
sandstorm-delete-raw-mongodb-confirm: Paarẹ awọn faili ibi ipamọ data MongoDB 3 aise lati tu aaye disk silẹ? A ti ṣí data naa tẹlẹ si FerretDB ati eto faili. Eyi ko le yi pada.
sandstorm-raw-mongodb-deleted: A ti paarẹ awọn faili ibi ipamọ data MongoDB aise, ti tu silẹ
cards-loading-lazy: Ọlẹ (awọn kaadi ti o han nikan)
cards-loading-description: Bii igbimọ kọọkan ṣe kojọpọ awọn kaadi rẹ. Gbogbo awọn kaadi: a kojọ kaadi kọọkan sinu ẹrọ aṣawakiri (rọrun julọ, gbogbo awọn ẹya ṣiṣẹ, ṣugbọn igbimọ pẹlu ẹgbẹẹgbẹrun awọn kaadi fi data pupọ ranṣẹ si oluwo kọọkan). Ọlẹ: atokọ kọọkan kojọ awọn kaadi ti o han lọwọlọwọ nikan (yiyi ailopin) pẹlu iye laaye, nitorina awọn igbimọ nla lo iranti ati bandiwidi kere. Tun ṣeto nipasẹ oniyipada agbegbe CARDS_LOADING.
cards-loading-lazy-note: Ikojọpọ kaadi ọlẹ jẹ idanwo: awọn oniye kaadi ati awọn opin WIP jẹ deede, ṣugbọn awọn wiwo Kalẹnda/Tabili/Gantt ati yiyan-pupọ ṣe afihan awọn kaadi ti a kojọ nikan bẹ. Tun kojọ awọn igbimọ ṣiṣi lẹhin yiyi eyi pada.
render-links-as-plain-text: Ṣe awọn ọna asopọ bi ọrọ pẹrẹsẹ
render-links-as-plain-text-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, gbogbo awọn ọna asopọ (mejeeji awọn ọna asopọ markdown bi [label](url) ati awọn ami HTML <a href> aise) ni a fihan nigbagbogbo bi ọrọ pẹrẹsẹ ti a ko le tẹ ni gbogbo aaye ọrọ ọlọrọ (awọn akọle igbimọ ati kaadi, awọn apejuwe, awọn ọrọìwòye, awọn akojọ ayẹwo, ati bẹbẹ lọ). Eyi ṣe idiwọ awọn ọna asopọ ti a le tẹ ti o ntan. Aiyipada jẹ paa, nitorina awọn ọna asopọ wa ni ti a le tẹ.
always-show-code-as-text: Nigbagbogbo fihan gbogbo koodu bi ọrọ pẹrẹsẹ
always-show-code-as-text-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, a ko ṣe ọrọ ọlọrọ bi markdown tabi HTML rara: a fihan gbogbo orisun nigbagbogbo bi ọrọ pẹrẹsẹ ni gbogbo aaye ọrọ ọlọrọ (awọn akọle igbimọ ati kaadi, awọn apejuwe, awọn ọrọìwòye, awọn akojọ ayẹwo, ati bẹbẹ lọ). Eyi ṣafihan akoonu ti o farasin — awọn ọrọìwòye HTML (<!-- -->), ibi-afẹde awọn ọna asopọ markdown, JavaScript ati koodu eyikeyi miiran — nitorina gbogbo koodu wa ni han nigbagbogbo, ti a ko le tẹ, ati ti ko nṣiṣẹ. Aiyipada jẹ paa, nitorina a ṣe markdown deede.
disable-all-import-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, gbogbo awọn ẹya gbigbe wọle ni a pa: gbigbe igbimọ wọle lati WeKan JSON, Trello, CSV/Excel, Jira, Kanboard, NextCloud Deck, OpenProject, GitHub, GitLab, Gitea ati Forgejo, ati ẹda igbimọ. A fi awọn aṣayan akojọ gbigbe wọle pamọ ati olupin kọ ibeere gbigbe wọle eyikeyi. Aiyipada jẹ paa.
disable-all-export-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, gbogbo awọn ẹya gbejade ni a pa: gbigbe igbimọ jade bi WeKan JSON, CSV, Excel, Kanboard, tabi si NextCloud Deck / OpenProject / GitHub / GitLab / Gitea / Forgejo, ati gbejade asomọ-kan. A fi awọn aṣayan akojọ gbejade pamọ ati olupin kọ ibeere gbejade eyikeyi. Aiyipada jẹ paa.
disable-import-avatars: Mu gbigbe wọle awọn afata alaabo
disable-import-avatars-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, a ko gbe awọn afata (awọn aworan profaili olumulo) wọle rara. Eyi bo gbigbe wọle WeKan JSON, gbigbe wọle Trello, ati muṣiṣẹpọ afata lati awọn olupese idanimọ ita ni iwọle (LDAP, OIDC/OAuth2). A tun gbe awọn orukọ ati data miiran wọle; awọn afata nikan ni a fo. Aiyipada jẹ paa.
disable-export-avatars-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, a ko fi awọn afata (awọn aworan profaili olumulo) kun rara nigbati o ba gbe igbimọ jade (gbejade WeKan JSON ati CSV). A tun gbe awọn orukọ olumulo ati data miiran jade; awọn afata nikan ni a fo. Aiyipada jẹ paa.
anonymize-import-users: Sọ awọn olumulo gbigbe wọle di aimọ
anonymize-import-users-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, gbigbe igbimọ WeKan JSON wọle rọpo orukọ olumulo, orukọ kikun ati awọn ibẹrẹ olumulo kọọkan ti a gbe wọle pẹlu awọn ibi idimu oniye (user1, user2, ...), ju afata wọn silẹ, ati tun kọ awọn mẹnu @username (ati awọn aaye ti a beere-nipa / ti a yansilẹ-nipa) inu akoonu kaadi ati ọrọìwòye ti a gbe wọle. A ko fi idanimọ olumulo gidi eyikeyi lati igbimọ orisun pamọ. Ọrọ "user" tẹle ede ẹni ti o gbe wọle. Aiyipada jẹ paa.
anonymize-export-users: Sọ awọn olumulo gbejade di aimọ
anonymize-export-users-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, gbigbe igbimọ jade rọpo orukọ olumulo, orukọ kikun ati awọn ibẹrẹ olumulo kọọkan ti a gbe jade pẹlu awọn ibi idimu oniye (user1, user2, ...), ju afata wọn silẹ, ati tun kọ awọn mẹnu @username (ati awọn aaye ti a beere-nipa / ti a yansilẹ-nipa) inu akoonu kaadi ati ọrọìwòye. Faili ti a gbe jade ko gbe idanimọ olumulo gidi eyikeyi. Ọrọ "user" tẹle ede ẹni ti o gbe jade. Aiyipada jẹ paa.
disable-activities: Mu gbogbo awọn iṣẹ ṣiṣe alaabo
disable-activities-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, a ko gbasilẹ awọn titẹsi ifunni-iṣẹ ṣiṣe rara ati pe a ko fihan wọn nibikibi (ẹgbẹ igbimọ ati taabu iṣẹ ṣiṣe kaadi). A ko pa itan ẹnikẹni ti o ṣe kini mọ. Aiyipada jẹ paa.
disable-notifications-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, WeKan ko fi awọn iwifunni ṣọra ranṣẹ rara (inu-app, imeeli tabi awọn iṣẹ miiran) fun iṣẹ ṣiṣe eyikeyi. A tun le gbasilẹ awọn iṣẹ ṣiṣe (ayafi ti a tun mu alaabo loke); awọn iwifunni nikan ni a dinku. Aiyipada jẹ paa.
disable-watch-description: Nigbati o ba ṣiṣẹ, a pa ẹya ṣọra — awọn olumulo ko le forukọsilẹ si awọn igbimọ, awọn atokọ tabi awọn kaadi lati gba awọn iwifunni, ati igbiyanju eyikeyi lati yi ipele ṣọra pada ni a kọ. Aiyipada jẹ paa.
backup-description: Ṣe afẹyinti Awọn Asomọ, Awọn Afata ati/tabi Data (gbogbo awọn akojọpọ ti o da lori ọrọ ti kii ṣe awọn asomọ tabi awọn afata). A ṣan .zip taara si ibi ipamọ ti a yan — ko si faili igba diẹ — bi backup/YYYY/MM/DD/HH_MM_SS/backup.zip, ti o ni YYYY_MM_DD-HH_MM_SS/attachments, /avatars ati /data ninu. Awọn ibi ipamọ awọsanma (S3/MinIO, Azure, GCS) lo awọn iwe-ẹri ti a ṣeto ninu awọn taabu ibi ipamọ wọn.
backup-restore-add-missing: Fi data ti o padanu nikan kun
backup-restore-select-first: Yan afẹyinti kan lati akojọ akọkọ.
backup-restore-confirm: Mu afẹyinti ti a yan pada? A kọ awọn asomọ/afata si eto faili ati data si ibi ipamọ data ni ibamu si ipo ti a yan.
gcs-key-filename-description: Yiyan: ọna si faili bọtini JSON akọọlẹ iṣẹ lori olupin.
gcs-credentials-description: Yiyan: lẹẹmọ bọtini JSON akọọlẹ iṣẹ. Fi silẹ ni ofo lati lo faili bọtini tabi awọn iwe-ẹri aiyipada.
gcs-permissions-note: Fun akọọlẹ iṣẹ WeKan ni iwọle kika/kikọ si apo naa: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → apo rẹ → Permissions → Grant access. Ninu "New principals", lẹẹmọ imeeli akọọlẹ iṣẹ — iye "client_email" lati bọtini JSON rẹ — lẹhinna yan ipa "Storage Object Admin" ki o Save.
cloud-secret-keep-blank: Fi silẹ ni ofo lati pa iye lọwọlọwọ mọ.
azure-container-description: Apoti blob lati fipamọ awọn faili sinu.
gcs-project-id-description: ID ise agbese Google Cloud rẹ.
gcs-bucket-description: Orukọ apo Cloud Storage lati fipamọ awọn faili sinu.
s3-endpoint-menu-path: AWS: fi silẹ ni ofo (lo endpoint agbegbe). Ti o ni ibamu pẹlu S3: URL Endpoint lati MinIO / Cloudflare R2 / Backblaze B2 / Wasabi / DigitalOcean Spaces console rẹ.
s3-region-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → apo rẹ → Properties → AWS Region.
s3-bucket-menu-path: AWS Console → S3 → Buckets → orukọ apo rẹ (tabi Create bucket → Bucket name).
s3-access-key-menu-path: AWS Console → IAM → Users → olumulo rẹ → Security credentials → Access keys → Create access key → yan ọran lilo 'Application running outside AWS' → Create access key. Ti a fihan bi 'Access key ID'.
s3-secret-key-menu-path: Iboju kanna bi Access key ID; a fihan 'Secret access key' ẹẹkan nikan nigbati a ba ṣẹda bọtini — daakọ rẹ nigba naa (tabi Download .csv).
azure-account-name-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akọọlẹ rẹ → orukọ ti a fihan ni oke (tun labẹ Security + networking → Access keys → Storage account name).
azure-account-key-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akọọlẹ rẹ → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Show → Key.
azure-connection-string-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akọọlẹ rẹ → Security + networking → Access keys → key1 → Connection string → Show.
azure-container-menu-path: Azure Portal → Storage accounts → akọọlẹ rẹ → Data storage → Containers → apoti rẹ (tabi + Container lati ṣẹda ọkan).
gcs-project-id-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → oluyan ise agbese ni oke → ID ise agbese rẹ (Cloud overview → Dashboard → Project info → Project ID).
gcs-bucket-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → Cloud Storage → Buckets → orukọ apo rẹ (tabi Create lati ṣe ọkan).
gcs-key-filename-menu-path: Ọna lori olupin WeKan si faili bọtini JSON akọọlẹ iṣẹ ti a gbasilẹ (ti a ṣẹda ni isalẹ). Lo eyi TABI lẹẹmọ JSON sinu aaye ni isalẹ.
gcs-credentials-menu-path: Google Cloud Console → IAM & Admin → Service accounts → akọọlẹ iṣẹ rẹ → Keys → Add key → Create new key → JSON → Create (gba faili naa wọle). Lẹẹmọ awọn akoonu rẹ nibi, tabi fipamọ faili naa ki o ṣeto ọna rẹ loke.
cloud-secret-set: (ti fipamọ — fi silẹ ni ofo lati pa mọ)
cloud-settings-saved: A ti fi awọn eto ibi ipamọ pamọ
cloud-settings-save-failed: Ikuna lati fi awọn eto ibi ipamọ pamọ
attachment-move-storage-azure: Gbe asomọ si Azure Blob Storage
attachment-move-storage-gcs: Gbe asomọ si Google Cloud Storage
gridfs-enabled-description: Lo MongoDB GridFS fun ibi ipamọ faili
migration-pause-failed: Kuna lati da awọn iṣiwa duro
migration-paused: Awọn iṣiwa ti daduro ni aṣeyọri
migration-stop-confirm: Ṣe o da ọ loju pe o fẹ da gbogbo awọn ijira duro?
migration-stop-failed: Kuna lati da awọn iṣiwa duro
gridfs-move-collectionfs-note: Lati jẹ ki awọn asomọ ati awọn afata han, gbe wọn lati CollectionFS si Ibi ipamọ eyikeyi miiran.
s3-access-key-description: AWS S3 bọtini wiwọle fun ìfàṣẹsí
s3-bucket-description: Orukọ garawa S3 fun titoju awọn faili
s3-enabled-description: Lo AWS S3 tabi MiniIO fun ibi ipamọ faili
s3-endpoint-description: URL ipari S3 (fun apẹẹrẹ, s3.amazonaws.com tabi minio.example.com)
s3-secret-key-description: AWS S3 bọtini ikoko fun ìfàṣẹsí
s3-settings-save-failed: Kuna lati fi eto S3 pamọ
s3-settings-saved: Eto S3 ti fipamọ ni aṣeyọri
s3-ssl-enabled-description: Lo SSL/TLS fun awọn asopọ S3
writable-path-description: Ipilẹ liana ọna fun ibi ipamọ faili
card-show-lists-on-minicard: Ṣe afihan Awọn atokọ lori Minicard
comprehensive-board-migration-descriptio: Ṣe awọn sọwedowo okeerẹ ati awọn atunṣe fun iduroṣinṣin data igbimọ, pẹlu tito akojọ, awọn ipo kaadi, ati eto swimlane.
delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migration: Pa Awọn atokọ Sofo Duplicate rẹ
delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migration-d: Lailewu npa awọn akojọ ẹda-iwe ṣofo rẹ kuro. Nikan yọkuro awọn atokọ ti ko ni awọn kaadi ATI ni atokọ miiran pẹlu akọle kanna ti o ni awọn kaadi ninu.
lost-cards-list: Awọn nkan ti a mu pada
restore-lost-cards-migration: Mu awọn kaadi ti sọnu pada
restore-lost-cards-migration-description: Wa ati mu pada awọn kaadi ati awọn atokọ pẹlu swimlaneId ti o padanu tabi listId. Ṣẹda a 'Awọn kaadi ti sọnu' swimlane lati jẹ ki gbogbo awọn ohun ti o sọnu han lẹẹkansi.
restore-all-archived-migration: Mu pada Gbogbo wa ni ipamọ
restore-all-archived-migration-descripti: Mu pada gbogbo awọn oju-omi kekere ti o fipamọ, awọn atokọ, ati awọn kaadi. Ṣe atunṣe eyikeyi swimlaneId ti o padanu tabi listId laifọwọyi lati jẹ ki awọn ohun kan han.
fix-missing-lists-migration: Fix Awọn akojọ ti o padanu
fix-missing-lists-migration-description: Ṣe awari ati tunṣe awọn atokọ ti o padanu tabi ti bajẹ ninu eto igbimọ.
fix-avatar-urls-migration-description: Ṣe imudojuiwọn awọn URL avatar fun awọn ọmọ ẹgbẹ igbimọ lati lo ẹhin ibi ipamọ to pe ati ṣatunṣe awọn itọkasi avatar ti o bajẹ.
fix-all-file-urls-migration: Ṣe atunṣe Gbogbo Awọn URL Faili
fix-all-file-urls-migration-description: Ṣe imudojuiwọn gbogbo awọn URL asomọ faili lori igbimọ yii lati lo ẹhin ibi ipamọ to tọ ati ṣatunṣe awọn itọkasi faili fifọ.
migrations-admin-only: Awọn alabojuto igbimọ nikan le ṣiṣe awọn iṣikiri
migrations-description: Ṣiṣe awọn sọwedowo iyege data ati awọn atunṣe fun igbimọ yii. Iṣilọ kọọkan le ṣee ṣe ni ẹyọkan.
no-issues-found: Ko si awọn iṣoro ti a rii
run-comprehensive-migration-confirm: Eyi yoo ṣe ijira okeerẹ lati ṣayẹwo ati ṣatunṣe iduroṣinṣin data igbimọ. Eyi le gba awọn iṣẹju diẹ. Tesiwaju bi?
run-delete-duplicate-empty-lists-migrati: Eyi yoo kọkọ ṣe iyipada awọn atokọ pinpin eyikeyi si awọn atokọ fun-swimlane, lẹhinna paarẹ awọn atokọ ofo ti o ni atokọ ẹda-iwe pẹlu akọle kanna ti o ni awọn kaadi ninu. Awọn atokọ ofo laiṣe laiṣe otitọ nikan ni yoo yọkuro. Tesiwaju bi?
run-restore-lost-cards-migration-confirm: Eleyi yoo ṣẹda a 'Sọnu Awọn kaadi' swimlane ati mimu pada gbogbo awọn kaadi ati awọn akojọ pẹlu sonu swimlaneId tabi listId. Eyi kan awọn nkan ti kii ṣe pamosi nikan. Tesiwaju bi?
run-restore-all-archived-migration-confi: Eyi yoo mu pada GBOGBO awọn ọkọ oju omi ti o wa ni ipamọ, awọn atokọ, ati awọn kaadi, jẹ ki wọn han lẹẹkansi. Eyikeyi awọn ohun kan pẹlu awọn ID ti o padanu yoo wa ni atunṣe laifọwọyi. Eyi ko le ṣe ni rọọrun mu pada. Tesiwaju bi?
run-fix-missing-lists-migration-confirm: Eyi yoo rii ati tunṣe awọn atokọ ti o padanu tabi ti bajẹ ninu eto igbimọ. Tesiwaju bi?
run-fix-avatar-urls-migration-confirm: Eyi yoo ṣe imudojuiwọn awọn URL avatar fun awọn ọmọ ẹgbẹ igbimọ lati lo ẹhin ibi ipamọ to pe. Tesiwaju bi?
run-fix-all-file-urls-migration-confirm: Eyi yoo ṣe imudojuiwọn gbogbo awọn URL asomọ faili lori igbimọ yii lati lo ẹhin ibi ipamọ to pe. Tesiwaju bi?
restore-lost-cards-nothing-to-restore: Ko si awọn ọkọ oju omi ti o sọnu, awọn atokọ, tabi awọn kaadi lati mu pada
migration-progress-note: Jọwọ duro lakoko ti a nlọ si igbimọ rẹ si eto tuntun…
step-create-missing-lists: Ṣẹda Awọn akojọ ti o padanu
step-delete-duplicate-empty-lists: Pa Awọn atokọ Sofo Duplicate rẹ
step-ensure-lost-cards-swimlane: Rii daju Swimlane Awọn kaadi ti sọnu
step-fix-missing-ids: Ṣe atunṣe Awọn ID ti o padanu
step-scan-users: Ṣiṣayẹwo awọn avatars ọmọ ẹgbẹ igbimọ
conversion-info-text: Iyipada yii ni a ṣe ni ẹẹkan fun igbimọ ati ilọsiwaju iṣẹ. O le tẹsiwaju lilo tabili deede.
converting-board-description: Iyipada igbimọ eto fun ilọsiwaju iṣẹ. Eyi le gba awọn iṣẹju diẹ.
migrate-all-to-filesystem: Gbe Gbogbo lọ si Eto Faili
migration-batch-size-description: Nọmba awọn asomọ lati ṣiṣẹ ni ipele kọọkan (1-100)
migration-cpu-threshold-description: Duro ijira nigbati lilo Sipiyu kọja ipin yii (10-90)
migration-delay-ms-description: Idaduro laarin awọn ipele ni milliseconds (100-10000)
migration-info-text: Awọn iṣipopada aaye data ni a ṣe ni ẹẹkan ati ilọsiwaju iṣẹ ṣiṣe eto. Ilana naa tẹsiwaju ni abẹlẹ paapaa ti o ba pa ẹrọ aṣawakiri rẹ.
migration-warning-text: Jọwọ maṣe tii ẹrọ aṣawakiri rẹ lakoko iṣiwa. Ilana naa yoo tẹsiwaju ni abẹlẹ ṣugbọn o le gba to gun lati pari.
monitoring-refresh-failed: Kuna lati sọ data ibojuwo sọtun
